title: Lobotomized SMP: Ground Zero
description: Adventure through Dungeons and Soar through Space! Build Museums!
body:
This is a pretty tame modpack, meant for the use on the LSMP!

Explore vast continents with plenty of new structures to find and restore!
Delve into new dungeons! Shoot for the stars in SPACE!

Build a museum to store the fossils you can scrounge up from the remnants of bygone eras! An old legend may even make an appearance, don't let it frighten you.

Whether your journeys take you to the skies or the depths, there's a little bit of something for everyone!Especially in the darker corners... I hear they may be Deeper and Darker than before...

Happy hunting, and live with an open mind.
